title: Get in touch - Munira.org.uk
text_excerpt: Get in touch - Munira.org.uk --> --> Home Help & Advice News Media Campaigns Get in touch Get in touch You can get in touch with Munira by emailing her on munira.wilson.mp@parliament.uk If you would like to get in touch with her constituency office by phone, the number is 020 8977 0606. The number for her parliamentary office is 020 7219 3000. Alternatively, please use the contact form on this page. Munira receives a lot of correspondence, but attempts to reply in as short a time as possible.
